allow: Bash(find C:Big_ProjectsAlkawther_Web/lib C:Big_ProjectsAlkawther_Web/types C:Big_ProjectsAlkawther_Web/data C:Big_ProjectsAlkawther_Web/store C:Big_ProjectsAlkawther_Web/config -type f \\\(-name *.tsx -o -name *.ts -o -name *.json \\\))

Bash(node -e "const net = require\(''net''\); const s = net.createConnection\(465, ''alkawther.net''\); s.setTimeout\(5000\); s.on\(''connect'', \(\) => { console.log\(''PORT 465: OPEN''\); s.destroy\(\); }\); s.on\(''timeout'', \(\) => { console.log\(''PORT 465: TIMED OUT \(blocked\)''\); s.destroy\(\); }\); s.on\(''error'', \(e\) => { console.log\(''PORT 465: ERROR -'', e.message\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const net = require\(''net''\); const s = net.createConnection\(587, ''alkawther.net''\); s.setTimeout\(5000\); s.on\(''connect'', \(\) => { console.log\(''PORT 587: OPEN''\); s.destroy\(\); }\); s.on\(''timeout'', \(\) => { console.log\(''PORT 587: TIMED OUT \(blocked\)''\); s.destroy\(\); }\); s.on\(''error'', \(e\) => { console.log\(''PORT 587: ERROR -'', e.message\); }\);")
